title: Uniquely Crispy Ethiopian Banana Fritters
description: A crispy and citrusy Ethiopian dish featuring fried ripe bananas, perfect for a midnight craving, this recipe is slow-cooked and gluten-free-friendly.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the gluten-free flour, cornstarch, and granulated sugar.
Add the lemon zest and lemon juice to the bowl and stir to combine.
In a separate bowl, beat the eggs until they are well mixed.
Add the sliced bananas to the bowl with the eggs and toss to coat.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the banana and egg mixture into the flour mixture and coat evenly.
Carefully place the coated banana balls into the hot oil and fry for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters warm and enjoy.
